title: dracaena fragrans
intro: Dracaena fragrans, also known as the corn plant or fragrant dracaena, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It has long, thin leaves with a pointed tip and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. Herbal preparations from the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to promote overall health and wellness, and may help to reduce stress, improve sleep, and boost the immune system.
